title: Baidan546's XP Tomes
description: Adds 3 tiers of XP tomes that can be used to store XP. Inspired by similar XP Tome mods on Forge.
body:
This simple mod adds three XP Tomes that can be used to store your xp.  To store XP, shift right click on a tome.  To release the XP, simply right click the tome.

There are three tiers:


![Standard Tome Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b9484030429f0fa5db9efd3f307778f824c2cad.png)

Standard XP Tome(30 Levels)

![Greater Tome Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cdc237667efcc85325e4753cfb5985d067e0204.png)

Greater XP Tome(45 Levels)

![Master Tome Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9880c8587e0d814ccb8577f5456600025ac2971a.png)

Master's XP Tome(60 Levels)


**One notable bug is that the tomes will not work properly when interacting with grindstones.  I will implement a fix for this in the future.  For now, avoid using the tomes with grindstones.**
